data.title: Bitcoin Is Still in a Strong Bullish Trend Despite Losing Major Support Level, Says Trader – Here’s His Outlook
data.description:
A widely followed cryptocurrency analyst and trader is leaning bullish on Bitcoin (BTC) amid a recent correction. The trader pseudonymously known as Sherpa tells his 246,700 followers on the social media platform X that Bitcoin is still in a “strong bullish trend” despite breaking below the $106,000 support level.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/31/bitcoin-is-still-in-a-strong-bullish-trend-despite-losing-major-support-level-says-trader-heres-his-outlook/

data.title: EU and US Aim for Resolution in Trade Negotiations by July
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on May 30, EU Commissioner for Trade and Economic Security Maroš Šefčovič held a call with U.S. Commerce Secretary Gina Raimondo. Šefčovič emphasized the importance of continued cooperation between the EU and the U.S. to find forward-looking solutions to ease current trade tensions. On the same day, EU Commissioner for Economic Affairs Valdis Dombrovskis stated that despite the increasingly complex global situation, the EU remains committed to an open strategy. The trade negotiations between the EU and the U.S. are at a critical stage, with both parties aiming to reach an agreement by July 9. Dombrovskis reiterated the EU's dedication to finding a negotiated solution with the U.S., although the outlook for these trade talks remains uncertain.

data.title: Sui Community Approves Proposal to Release Seized Funds After Cetus Vulnerability
data.description:
According to PANews, the Sui community has recently approved an on-chain proposal to release approximately $162 million that was seized during last week's Cetus vulnerability incident. This decision will enable the decentralized exchange (DEX) to reimburse users and resume full operations. The affected funds will be transferred to a multi-signature wallet and held in escrow until they are returned to users as per the plan led by Cetus.

Cetus has announced its intention to complete the full recovery and relaunch within approximately one week. This process includes data recovery, restarting the upgraded CLMM contract, and fully restoring all suspended product features, including liquidity provider (LP) functions.

data.title: Analysis: Trade tensions escalate again, causing volatility in the crypto market, and investors' cautious sentiment increases
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The cryptocurrency market suffered a sharp drop this weekend, with Dogecoin falling more than 8%, PEPE falling 12%, and Bitcoin falling more than 2%, trading just above $103,600. ETH fell nearly 4%, while Ripple (XRP), BNB Chain (BNB), ADA and SOL all fell 2-5%. Analysts believe that the recession is related to the renewed escalation of trade tensions, and market volatility is expected to continue. The derivatives market also shows that investors are increasingly cautious. According to Deribit data, since April, open interest in Bitcoin futures has increased by 51%, while options contracts have surged by 126%. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Cetus: Segregated funds on Sui have been transferred to a multi-signature wallet jointly managed with Sui Foundation and OtterSec
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Cetus Protocol, a decentralized exchange in the Sui ecosystem that was previously hacked, posted on the X platform that after the on-chain vote was approved, the funds previously isolated on Sui have now been safely transferred to a multi-signature trust wallet jointly managed by Cetus, Sui Foundation and OtterSec, and are now officially entering the next stage of the recovery process. In order to keep the community informed and actively participate, a Space meeting is tentatively scheduled for June 2 to review the hacker attack in detail and share the recovery progress.

data.title: Cetus Protocol Advances Recovery After Hack with Multisig Wallet Transfer
data.description:
According to Odaily, the decentralized exchange Cetus Protocol, part of the Sui ecosystem, has announced progress in its recovery process following a recent hack. The funds previously isolated on the Sui network have been securely transferred to a multisig trust wallet managed jointly by Cetus, the Sui Foundation, and OtterSec. This marks the next phase in the recovery efforts.

To keep the community informed and engaged, Cetus Protocol plans to hold a Space meeting on June 2, where they will review the details of the hacking incident and share updates on the recovery progress.

data.title: Matador Technologies Secures Investment for Bitcoin and Gold Acquisition
data.description: According to PANews, Matador Technologies, a fintech company specializing in Bitcoin, has received an investment totaling 1.5 million Canadian dollars from digital asset management firm Arrington Capital. The funds will be allocated for the purchase of Bitcoin, gold acquisition, and general corporate purposes.

data.title: U.S. government urges Supreme Court to dismiss Coinbase users' lawsuit against IRS for crypto trading records
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The US government has urged the Supreme Court not to accept Coinbase users' lawsuit against the IRS for obtaining their crypto trading records. Relevant documents show that US Deputy Attorney General D. John Sauer argued that Coinbase user James Harper did not have the right granted by the Fourth Amendment to protect his financial records held by the exchange.
It is reported that in 2016, the IRS launched an investigation into the widespread underreporting of taxes on cryptocurrency gains. At that time, the IRS found that millions of Coinbase users had huge tax gaps when trading Bitcoin, so it forced Coinbase to hand over the records of large customers. James Harper subsequently filed a lawsuit, claiming that the IRS's actions amounted to an unconstitutional search of his personal records. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: James Wynn: I'll be back, same as always
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: James Wynn, the giant whale, posted on the X platform: "I will make a comeback, as always, I will enjoy doing this, I also like games, I like swings, money depends entirely on the mentality, I made a big bet, carefully calculated, and made a lot of money, most of you dare not, you don't have such ability, and lack the mentality, my passive income every month is more than most of you make in a year. However, money can't make you truly rich, peace, happiness, family, love, loyalty, health, nature, sunshine, dogs, can make you feel rich. And I have kept all of this firmly in my heart. I am freer now than before."

data.title: Is it a Good Idea to add Bitcoin To Your 401(k) Retirement Plan? Risks and Benefits
data.description:

Its historical returns and tax advantages are appealing, but extreme volatility makes Bitcoin a really high-risk bet. High fees, regulatory uncertainty, and allocation limits weaken its real weight compared to traditional index funds. Since 2022,. . .

data.title: U.S. government urges court to dismiss lawsuit over Coinbase users' cryptocurrency records
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. government argued in a Supreme Court filing that Coinbase user James Harper had no right to prevent the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) from obtaining his cryptocurrency trading records. In a document filed on May 30, U.S. Attorney General D. John Sauer argued that Coinbase user James Harper had no Fourth Amendment right to protect his financial records held on the exchange. The government claimed that Harper "voluntarily" shared his data with Coinbase and that the IRS followed due process of law to obtain the data through a judicially approved subpoena.
Harper's case revolved around an IRS investigation in 2016 into the widespread underreporting of taxes on cryptocurrency gains. At the time, the IRS found that millions of Coinbase users traded Bitcoin, while relatively few taxpayers reported cryptocurrency gains, and subsequently forced Coinbase to hand over the records of its high-volume customers.
Harper, who traded Bitcoin on Coinbase in the relevant years, later filed a lawsuit claiming that the IRS's actions constituted an unconstitutional search of his personal records. A lower court disagreed, ruling that Coinbase's records were business documents, not Harper's personal documents, and that the IRS acted legally. In its complaint, the government argued that Supreme Court precedent supports the IRS's position. The government cited past cases that emphasized that individuals have no reasonable expectation of privacy in financial records held by a third party, Coinbase. The Supreme Court has not yet decided whether to hear the case. If it dismisses, the First Circuit's ruling in favor of the IRS will remain intact. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bitcoin and RWA financial technology company Matador receives $1.5 million in strategic investment
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matador Technologies, a financial technology development company focusing on Bitcoin and tokenized real-world assets, announced that it has received a total investment of 1.5 million Canadian dollars from Arrington Capital.
Arrington Capital is a digital asset management company founded in 2017 by Michael Arrington, founder of TechCrunch and CrunchBase, Heather Harde, CEO of TechCrunch, and Geoffrey Arone. This investment will be used to purchase Bitcoin, gold acquisitions and general corporate purposes.

data.title: Stablecoin USDG now available on Ink blockchain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Global Dollar Network announced that Global Dollar (USDG) is now available on the Ink blockchain. USDG is a single-currency stablecoin pegged to the US dollar issued by Paxos. It has been available on the Solana blockchain and maintains Ethereum compatibility. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Global Dollar Network Expands USDG Availability to Ink Blockchain
data.description: According to Odaily, Global Dollar Network has announced that its stablecoin, Global Dollar (USDG), is now available on the Ink blockchain. USDG, a single-currency stablecoin pegged to the U.S. dollar and issued by Paxos, was previously accessible on the Solana blockchain while maintaining compatibility with Ethereum.

data.title: Meta shareholders reject push for Bitcoin adoption
data.description:
Meta Platforms shareholders have voted down a proposal to assess adding Bitcoin to the company’s treasury during an annual meeting this week.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/meta-shareholders-reject-bitcoin-adoption/
